properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a river And it flows from deep within There is a fountain That frees the soul from sin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come to this water There is a vast supply There is a river that never shall run dry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There was a thirsty woman She was drawing from the well See, her life was ruined and wasted And her soul was bound for hell

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, but then she met the Master And He told her of her sin And He said, “If you drink this water, You’ll never thirst again”
